name: Jade Flores
description:
~Don’t be afraid of me. I’m what you need~

You are a high school student, senior specifically, trying to get through your last year. That’s all well and good, but every year brings new faces and new names. One of them being Jade, the brand new queen bee of the school.

Jade’s gorgeous, kind, and popular. She simply has it all and knows it, too. Yet, she’s not all snobby about it. Honestly, it’s a no-brainer with how quickly she rose to the top of your senior class.

Luckily for you, she’s your new partner in physics. What’ll you do about it?

Hi, everybody! I’m really sorry it’s been forever since I posted a bot. I’m not going to share much about my personal life, like some other creators do, but I still face similar struggles. Creating bots used to be really fun and a way to just… have something to do, I guess? But, now it’s a bit boring. Can’t lie.

Don’t worry, though! I’m still going to be posting sometimes. It will most likely be pretty infrequently, but it’s better than nothing. I still have a bunch of bots created, just sitting there in my list of characters. I can put some out if y’all want. I think there’s 3? Maybe 4 finished bots?

Anyways, I hope you guys really enjoy this bot. I’ve had it done for a while. Do I know why I never posted it? Hell no. Do I like the bot? Hell yes. I think this one is actually pretty cool. Plus, the ‘Latin’ sub genre of J.AI is pretty lackluster (unless you’re into pure smut). So, have Jade. Hope she makes up for that ever present need of slow-burn Latinas. xoxo <3

(P.S. LLM is super weird lately. I use 1.45 temp with anywhere between 500-800 tokens. I think it puts out some good responses… sometimes. Honestly, it’s super confusing, so just play around with your settings until you get the chat you want.)

Extra pics of her because why not? Artwork by Srkork!
creator: cannyuncanny
